packets.title: Opening section against the frozen outline
packets.summary: Draft and verify the paper opening without reopening locked claims, title scope, or principal-scalability boundaries.
packets.success_condition: Opening draft passes deterministic prose verification and pauses at human review.

packets.title: Theory foundations fragment
packets.summary: Draft the invariant / T1 / T2 foundations as a bounded fragment without silently reopening the verified opening contract.
packets.success_condition: Theory foundations fragment is drafted and verified against a bounded prose spec.

packets.title: Theory mechanism fragment
packets.summary: Draft the T3 / T4 / interface section as a bounded fragment that depends on the foundations fragment.
packets.success_condition: Theory mechanism fragment is drafted and verified against a bounded prose spec.

packets.title: Empirical evidence fragment
packets.summary: Draft the empirical evidence section as a bounded fragment with explicit evidence classes and non-claims.
packets.success_condition: Evidence fragment is drafted and verified against a bounded prose spec.

packets.title: Counterarguments and boundaries fragment
packets.summary: Draft the counterarguments/boundaries section, including the principal-scalability and prompt-alignment distinctions, as a bounded fragment.
packets.success_condition: Counterarguments fragment is drafted and verified against a bounded prose spec.

packets.title: Related work and limitations fragment
packets.summary: Draft the related-work and limitations material as a bounded fragment without reclassifying the paper's non-claims.
packets.success_condition: Related-work/limitations fragment is drafted and verified against a bounded prose spec.

packets.title: Conclusion fragment
packets.summary: Draft the conclusion as a bounded fragment that closes the paper without introducing new claims.
packets.success_condition: Conclusion fragment is drafted and verified against a bounded prose spec.
